title: Travel Bites
description: A small vanilla-friendly mod that adds simple, intuitive food options making it ideal for travel and exploration.
body:
![Travel Bites](https://i.imgur.com/tZ1gzj7.png)

**Travel Bites** is a small vanilla-friendly mod that adds simple and intuitive food options to your game.

Recipes are designed to be easy to understand and craft using familiar vanilla ingredients, making the mod perfect for travel, exploration, and everyday gameplay.

This mod is available for **Fabric, NeoForge, and Forge**.  
All food can be crafted using **in-game vanilla resources**.
**Requires Fabric API for Fabric versions**



## 💡 Tips

For recipes, it's recommended to use:
- **Just Enough Items (JEI)**
- **Roughly Enough Items (REI)**

Recipes will also appear in your Minecraft recipe book after being crafted once.

If you don’t use a recipe mod, you can find all recipes here:  
📄 **[Travel Bites Recipes](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1axU0a9bnuPWEeSuIcWWaCtB8aL9ogAjE/view?usp=sharing)**



## 🌾 Compatibility

Works with most other food mods.



### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted.
You are free to include it in modpacks or videos with proper credit.
